description:
Add the manual server action "BICC v5: Send SMS Queue Digest" plus a menu
entry under Recruitment → Reporting that triggers it. When fired, it emails
the HR Recruitment Manager group ONE digest of every applicant who needs an
SMS follow-up right now, grouped by job position. Each job is rendered as
its own 3-column table (Applicant name with link, mobile number, ready-to
send SMS text with first name + company short name + job role pre-filled).

The three queues feeding the digest mirror the existing daily
sms_queue_digest cron: Qualification info-survey pending (Stage 2),
Stage 1 resume missing, Stage 7 assessment pending. The wording of each
candidate's SMS depends on which queue they sit in.

HR copies each SMS into their phone, sends it manually, then marks the
corresponding x_studio_sms_*_date on the applicant so the queue clears.
The action does not send anything to applicants directly and does not
mutate any reminder fields.

Defensive: each queue field-checks at runtime, so the action is safe to
deploy before the v5 reminder-field blocks land — queues whose driving
field is missing are simply omitted from the digest.

Entry points: HR can fire the digest either from Recruitment → Reporting
→ SMS Follow-up Queue, or from any applicant's gear-icon Action menu
(form + list views).
